payload.author: claude
payload.body: Acceptance scenarios are implemented and passing (test/multi-tenant-pg.test.js + test/pg-rls-live.test.js + test/invites-pg.test.js: two-user isolation incl. RLS, invite grants scoped access, viewer cannot write, tenant+role-scoped sync, actor authz). NOT closing yet: the full suite shows an INTERMITTENT cross-process failure (~1 in 3 runs, varies by file) when many PG test processes share scope_test concurrently - ensureAuthSchema is now advisory-locked which reduced it, but root cause not yet pinned. Closing this ticket = flake fixed + 3 consecutive clean full-suite runs.
